title: schoenorchis chrysantha
intro: Schoenorchis chrysantha, also known as Golden Lip Orchid, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Southeast Asian cultures, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Schoenorchis chrysantha are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory health, making it a potential treatment for various conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and roots are commonly used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed as a remedy for various ailments.
